title: plantago humilior
intro: Plantago humilior, also known as common plantain, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the plantain genus. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Plantago humilior include treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, as well as helping to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
